About Me

I Fix the Gaps
Others Miss.

I'm Peace — a Customer Support Specialist and Virtual Assistant with over two years of remote experience helping e-commerce and service businesses stay responsive, organised, and customer-focused even when everything is moving fast.

My work sits at the intersection of customer experience and backend operations. I don't just answer tickets — I track what's causing them, flag the patterns, and help businesses get ahead of the next wave before it hits.

The numbers tell the story: a 95% CSAT score, a 40% reduction in response time, a 15% conversion rate increase from better pre-purchase support, and 10+ admin hours saved every week through booking automation. I'm calm under pressure, proactive by nature, and I follow through — always.

Lagos, Nigeria · Remote-Ready

Scaling Customer Success for a High-Growth Skincare Brand

Turning inbox chaos into loyalty — across every channel

The Challenge

The brand was experiencing a surge in orders but struggling to maintain a personal touch. Inboxes were cluttered, response times were slipping, and customers were falling through the cracks — leading to frustrated buyers and abandoned carts.

What I Did
  • Acted as the primary point of contact across Shopify Inbox, email, and Instagram/Facebook — maintaining one unified, warm brand voice everywhere
  • Reduced average first-response time by 40%, consistently hitting sub-hour replies during peak hours — directly contributing to a 15% conversion rate increase
  • Managed the full order lifecycle — tracking, delivery failures, returns — while maintaining a 95% CSAT score throughout
  • Built a triage system for skin sensitivity and ingredient queries, escalating to the product team to protect brand reputation
  • Boosted repeat customer engagement by 20% through personalised social media responses and product recommendations
✦ Outcome
95% CSAT. 40% faster responses. 15% conversion lift. 20% repeat engagement boost via social. Frustrated customers turned into loyal repeat buyers.

System Setup Freshdesk Blogspot

Full Helpdesk Build for a Bakery Brand

Zero to fully operational support system — end to end, no oversight

The Challenge

Customer inquiries were scattered with no central tracking. Every question required a manual response — no self-service options, no visibility into issue patterns.

What I Delivered
  • Created and fully configured a Freshdesk account — connected the support inbox and set up 4 routing departments for organised ticket assignment
  • Authored 3 knowledge base solution articles and made the KB accessible via a live Freshdesk widget
  • Designed a Victoria Bakes company website on Blogspot and integrated the Freshdesk widget directly into it for seamless live support access
  • System went live with 37 tickets tracked from day one — full visibility achieved immediately
✦ Outcome
All inquiries centralised into one trackable system. Self-service reduced repetitive questions. The business gained complete visibility — and a professional website to match.

Automation Acuity Scheduling Stripe Google Calendar

Automated Booking System for Cyntex Haircare

Saving 10+ hours a week and eliminating missed appointments — permanently

The Challenge

A growing haircare brand was losing time and revenue to manual booking. Clients were confused about service durations, the team was overwhelmed by rescheduling requests, and missed appointments were hurting the bottom line.

What I Did
  • Configured Acuity Scheduling as a 24/7 automated receptionist — appointment types, availability rules, and buffer times between high-intensity treatments
  • Designed custom digital intake forms collecting hair history and allergy info upfront, cutting 15 minutes of chair consultations per client
  • Integrated Stripe deposit payments and built cancellation policies directly into the booking flow to protect revenue
  • Set up personalised SMS and email reminder sequences with after-care instructions, significantly reducing no-shows
✦ Outcome
100% automated scheduling. 25% fewer no-shows. 10+ admin hours saved every week. Revenue protected through mandatory deposits. Live calendar managing multiple stylists across services.

Platforms

Automations
Operations Trello Monday.com Slack

Staff Task Management System & Team Coordination

Replacing guesswork with clarity, ownership, and daily accountability

What I Did
  • Designed and implemented a Trello Kanban board (To Do → Doing → Done) with daily priority task assignments per staff member across services
  • Built a Monday.com project board with defined phases, status tracking, and 7 live automations — including Slack notifications when tasks become stuck
  • Set up cross-platform notifications so team members stayed informed without needing to check multiple tools manually
  • Created a daily check-in structure: 15–20 minutes, top 3 priorities, blockers, and clear deadlines
✦ Outcome
Daily operational efficiency improved. Miscommunication and task overlap eliminated. Full visibility at a glance — accountability built into the system, not enforced manually.

Targeted Lead List Generation via Apollo.io

Clean, verified, outreach-ready prospect data — delivered on brief

What I Did

Generated targeted lead lists using Apollo.io — names, job titles, companies, and locations — ensuring all data was verified, accurate, and structured for immediate CRM import and outreach campaigns. Delivered in clean Google Sheets format with clear categorisation by role and organisation.

Skills Applied
  • Prospect research and targeting criteria definition based on client brief
  • Data accuracy verification and list hygiene before delivery
  • CRM-ready formatting with outreach-optimised data structure
✦ Outcome
Actionable, verified lead lists delivered on time — saving the client hours of manual research and enabling targeted outreach campaigns from day one.

My Approach

How I Work With
Founders & Teams

My goal in week one is always the same: create clarity, visibility, and momentum — without creating extra work for you.

Day-to-Day Structure
Daily Check-Ins That Actually Work

15–20 minute daily check-ins structured around three things: top priorities for the day, active blockers, and clear next steps with deadlines. Concise, action-oriented. No unnecessary meetings.

Task Board Design
Every Task Has an Owner & a Deadline

Using Asana, Trello, or Monday, I structure work into Backlog → This Week → Today → Waiting On → Done. Every task has a defined outcome, assigned owner, and specific deadline. Ambiguity removed.

Follow-Through
Nothing Slips. Ever.

I maintain a dedicated "Waiting On" tracker and proactively chase clients, vendors, and teams before deadlines slip. You don't carry the mental load — I do.

"Earlier this week, we agreed the proposal was the top priority. Would you like to reprioritise, or should we bring that back to the top?"
Get in Touch

Together

I'm open to remote customer support, virtual assistant, and operations roles — full-time, part-time, or project-based. If you need someone who takes ownership and delivers without being chased, let's talk.
